FR-01.title: Parking Facility Registration
requirements: Implement complete parking facility registration functionality

Error messages display clearly for parking facility registration failures

FR-01.title: Build Parking Facility Registration API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for parking facility registration feature in Smart Parking Management System. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.title: Build Parking Facility Registration UI
FR-01.description: Create user interface components for parking facility registration. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.

FR-01.title: Write Parking Facility Registration Tests
FR-01.description: Write unit and integration tests for parking facility registration feature. Cover happy path, error cases, edge cases, and validation rules. Achieve minimum 80% coverage.
